payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Do you want to get close to it first? You have a jaunty jog on your way towards the Gilded Run. A very short time passes before you begin to actually hear the waters in the distance. And as you begin to approach, about a hundred feet from the edge of the first stripe of river, and you can see some are tighter together, some are only a few feet between the rivers, some merge into even thicker roaring rapids. They're all traveling from the seaward side to the tangleward side. In layman's terms: west to east.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We could fashion a crude canoe and go down it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or I could part the sea. I'm going to take my staff, and I want to feel how deep it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you decide to walk the half-mile to make it to the river?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we were there. It's a lot going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's walk the half-mile. It's a half-mile!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And it looks like a long river?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a series of long rivers that completely wrap around the Shademirk. One side of it seems to be vanishing into the Green Sea, which you could barely see to the far seaward side of you, and it curves around the outside of the Shademirk and vanishes into the horizon.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a river.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a big river.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It looks like a river, at the very least. Don't trust anything in the Feywild!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I perception and see if there are any sort of creatures that are visible?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 13? With but an instant of reaction time, it passes a good solid foot and a half in front of his face. His wings furl. A couple of feathers dangle down, and he turns around and decides to hop over the next bit of the river.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! And I crawl over and grab it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You grab it and pull it out. As you turn back over, your brother's sitting there with his arms crossed, his wings still folded, smiling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I swing around and hit him with the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an attack roll. This is not with your bow, by the way. This is just adding your proficiency bonus. You're not even proficient. This is an improvised weapon, so you have disadvantage. Go ahead and roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage? Aw, come on. That was so much better than the first one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not proficient, really, in attacking with brooms.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At the hip. And you catch it. Grog, you see the hand emerge, and you catch the edge of it and pull him up out of the river. He's now out. Caught his breath; he's no longer beneath the surface. You guys are still being pulled, now, by the water. Your feet are beginning to fall out from under you as the rocks that are holding you up are being pulled along by the force of the river. It seems the longer you're in the river, the stronger it's getting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe it's a plus four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. Without an issue, you watch as this giant anchor of a man is being held solid by this tiny rock of a gnomish cleric.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Go get him, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (muffled) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as her teeth bite down, and her tongue sticks out the edge as she digs her feet into the bottom of the river rock. Percy, you see a dark form in the river as you're rushing past. I need you to make a perception check with disadvantage, as you're being drawn underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perception check with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a perception check with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's not that bad. Where's my perception? There it is: 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14, okay. Just as you see this strange dark form appear out of the way, you instinctively sweep your hand out, and you smack and catch the edge of Grog's pants.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He has pants? (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You're tying the rope to an arrow. Okay. You have, at this point, a good seven minutes left.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I walk over to a tree just in case their plan fails? I want to start chopping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go up to one of the nearby trees at the edge, and you can see across the way, it looks like there's part of a crumpled stone corner, some long dilapidated ruin. You can see what looks to be one dried tree log that has fallen over and rotting on the other side. But there is one tree right on the edge of the bank that you guys are on that leads across this next river that is pretty solid looking. Maybe four feet in thickness there and 25 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't do it, Grog! Do not do it yet!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I hope your stupid plan works!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Grog. Remember when we almost died because I picked a flower? Just throwing it out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm super bored, so do your plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start tying the rope to an arrow.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, and your brother does well. Of course he does. You guys all manage to catch yourselves right now, still attached by the rope as you now see this heaping 15- to 20-foot-long giant barrel of muscle, green scaled skin, but what looks to be hundreds of tiny roots that spread from the center of its midsection, reaching into the ground. As it begins to move forward, it's actually rooting and uprooting itself as it moves. You can see the moisture and the life force of the land is pulsing into its form as it holds Grog in its jaws. I need you all to roll initiative. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good river. Good boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I keep an eye out for whatever I stepped on in the river?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Six!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, being in the front of the troupe, as the river is slowly separated for this, you step down into the mud, and you don't notice a similar shift curl up behind you as suddenly a rapid (whoosh). A set of gargantuan, long tooth-filled jaws come pouring out of the mud underneath the bank, snapping towards your large half-giant form. (evil chuckle) It has begun. That is a 22 to hit. I believe that hits your armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That'll hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Getting ready for the first real attack damage of tonight's episode.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How come we never noticed the battle map has a river on it? Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You suffer 27 points of piercing damage. (groaning, laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You, Grog, are suddenly grappled. The jaws have latched onto your midsection and hold you. You guys look ahead as you see this form, this spray of dark grimy mud and river-bottom muck gets flung into the air. You see what looks to be a far larger than you've ever seen before crocodile-like entity has come bursting out from under the river. You see the sheer force of the impact pushes him forward and carries him onto the other side of the river, in doing so, dragging all of you behind him at a rapid pace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're across!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most of you go flying in an arc at the sheer force of this impact. I need you guys to make acrobatics checks to try to stop yourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not a catfish!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Acrobatics or athletics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Acrobatics.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's my jam. 27.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so Keyleth, you're up first. You watch as this giant mass of a creature is now clutching Grog in its jaws, and you see its tail begin to whip up, and it's now guarding itself on all sides as the roots are dragging themselves into the earth around you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But I did roll shit initiative, as usual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There he is. There's Garmelie. Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was terrible initiative. I am embarrassed by my initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My initiative is really bad, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is crazy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So top of the round, we have initiative of 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 20. Shut up, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Go, Keyleth!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think that's ever happened before. That's never happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so Keyleth, a 20. 20 to 15, anyone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. 15 to ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is our first live initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because it didn't happen last time!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're all going to die.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan and Pike, what did you guys get?

preceding_turns.text: I rolled a big fat six.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I got a four!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The gnomes bringing up the rear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We were caught off-guard by this whole thing. She was teaching me the swirley-whirley while this was all going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's exactly what was happening.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. Things go to darkness. You now have a general idea of what Scanlan and Vax went through, oh but a few days ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're all still tied to him!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're all attached to him, though!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You all got dragged right to the edge of its mouth, so right now, Percy, you have the rope right at the edge of its giant snapping jaws.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're a big set of anal beads.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can he roll for gag reflex? There's a rope coming out of his throat.

preceding_turns.text: This creature's pretty profound at swallowing larger entities, so that's fine. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyway. Grog, you're currently blinded and restrained.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Blinded and restrained?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. You duck under it as it scrapes across the ground, causing this huge section of the dirt to grind past, leaving a small trough behind. That's going to end its turn. It is now your turn, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're a big set of anal beads.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can he roll for gag reflex? There's a rope coming out of his throat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Things go to darkness. You now have a general idea of what Scanlan and Vax went through, oh but a few days ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Yeah, you are completely locked inside of it right there. It also spins around as it does so, and its tail (whiplash) whips out, and you see at the very tip of its tail what looks to be some sort of strange, jagged stinger. This is going to whip around in the direction of you, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be only a 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. It misses.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He can't really move at that point. It is now Garmelie's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, brother!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is not going to use his haste boots, though; he's going to save that for later. That's two attacks; both hit. So with the first strike and with the offhand throw. The first one with sneak attack, because it is currently next to Percy. You are threatening it at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I hope I have its attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 28 points of damage, and the second strike for a total of nine. So after Vax throws both daggers, both sink into the sides of the giant crocodile. It moves ever so slightly with the first impact, the second one seemingly to no effect. Both daggers appear in a puff of smoke to the side of his belt and he looks to you and goes, "Sister, what are we going to do?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Perfect. That ends your turn. It is now the croc's turn. It's going to make a bite attack right now. This is going to be at Percy, since you're right there in front of him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's not inspiring somebody. It is intended to distract the opponent. And this crocodile, probably having a rather rough time in the early 2000s, manages to provide even more bile from its stomach at the sound of a rehashed Hanson song. Go ahead and make your roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You were intent on that happening. As it reaches out to try and bite towards Grog, it hears the sound and its head quirks, vomits a little. Grog, you manage to get away, at that point, we'll say about that far. As you turn around, the daisy chain has not followed you. Glancing down, the rope that was once around your waist has snapped by the growth in size, and all the rest of the ropes have also been snapped. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you're out!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The crocodile has now snapped, its jaws moving to Percy, and Percy, you're currently held tight in its jaws. It's trying to lift you up now, possibly to fill its now terribly empty stomach. It lost more than it originally started this battle with. As it swings around its tail, in doing so, its stinger sweeps overhead. It has a reach of ten at this point. We'll say in that arc there. This is going to be towards Vex. Towards you Vex, with disadvantage. Still, that's a 21. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you're out!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits you. All right, as the head turns back towards you, it opens to the side and tries to clamp on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm using my new fancy counter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, your counter ring.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so excited to take damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is a 34.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not that excited to take damage. 34?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 34 points of piercing damage, and you are currently grappled and restrained.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Grappled and restrained.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, that ends the crocodile's turn, and it is now your turn. Currently, you cannot take reactions, and I need you to roll a d8 to see what you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You got this.

preceding_turns.text: Do I?

preceding_turns.text: You do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten!

preceding_turns.text: Well, you take 16 points of piercing damage from the actual stinger itself striking you. You now feel that pulse of venom through your body, and as it begins to swell through you, you feel all the colors and all the images of the landscape around you begin to shift and bubble and move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're tripping, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are tripping balls right now. You look to your left and see Garmelie next to you, whose frightened expression becomes suddenly this giant feral wolverine that hisses at you! You look to your right, and you see the giant crocodile holding Percy suddenly merge into one strange, giant Medusa creature. You don't know which way is up and down, and you are extremely frightened and confused.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're frightened? Oh no, it's a bad trip.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean I lose my turn?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As soon as your vision comes back to you and a breath of relief hits your form as suddenly you have control of your form. As it begins to be sucked under the water. End of your turn. Percy, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean I lose my turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) You're so stunned by this moment, and your brain being completely turned around. What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll of five. Okay. You take no action, and you use all of your movement to move in a random direction. You go into the river. You turn around and begin to flee. Looking ahead of you, you see what seems to be a moving sea of grass, and all of a sudden you feel your feet (splashing). The river begins to pull you away at the end of your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Son of a bitch. Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: She turns back time.

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: Is he regenerating himself?

payload.speaker: MATT

payload.speaker: MATT

You guys continue forward for about 30 minutes, not really understanding the direction. You know that heavy mountain that you saw on the way in is central and to the right of your direction, and you're not entirely certain where the tree is here in the Shademirk, but you're keeping your eyes peeled, and you continue to move forward further and further in. It is difficult. It is hot. It is muggy. There are heavy insects, large winged bugs (buzzing) through the air, and you knock them away. The bubbling of the ground itself is releasing sulfurous gas and various other chemicals into the air that are probably not healthy to breathe extensively. Many of you are having to cover your mouth to keep from coughing to break up your stealth capabilities.

preceding_turns.text: I give him a-- from a distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I fucked it all up. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a natural 20. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 32! Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a 30. I'm so quiet!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And over here we have 12-foot-tall Grog. What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys begin trudging forward into the Shademirk. Everyone's being kind of... and he's lumbering through it like a mammoth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're being sneaky, guys!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. So as you ascend the side of the nearest tree, and it resembles Atreyu climbing up the tree in the Swamp of Sadness, as it's these large gnarled branches and bits of muck and dust falling off the sides, and the oil slick that is surrounding the base makes it difficult to find your handholds, but you do eventually get your way up into the tree over the next five to ten minutes. You were going to cast Commune with Nature, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Little bits go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, Pikey. Let's go knock on the door and get killed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If you fucking get my broom lost because you told me not to go, I'm going to murder you. And this is not in character. This is me telling you that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I just want to say, that was a death threat in front of a thousand people. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think with this many witnesses, it's not a threat. It's a promise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is there a nearby tree that I can climb into?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are a number of trees in the vicinity, yes. Where this thing is, though, there is about a 30-foot distance between it and any other trees. It's in the center of a small clearing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want a good vantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I get into a vantage point. I get up into a tree, and while they go do their recon, I want to cast Commune With Nature.

payload.raw_text: Okay. In feeling any source of bodies of water, you're too far from the Gilded Run to sense any of that, and there is no running water within the actual Shademirk. Everything is a very slow-rolling sludge from the direction that you initially sensed. It's this perpetual billowing of slow, crawling death. What little bit of running water you would sense is deep underground, and probably still in danger, over the next 50 years or so, of being corrupted itself.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Northwest. Okay. So I can safely assume that the tree that they're heading towards is not cancerous.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: So we should call them back.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm meditating. Then can I get a general lay of the land and sense running water and rivers, so we can avoid those?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. In feeling any source of bodies of water, you're too far from the Gilded Run to sense any of that, and there is no running water within the actual Shademirk. Everything is a very slow-rolling sludge from the direction that you initially sensed. It's this perpetual billowing of slow, crawling death. What little bit of running water you would sense is deep underground, and probably still in danger, over the next 50 years or so, of being corrupted itself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Northwest. Okay. So I can safely assume that the tree that they're heading towards is not cancerous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we should call them back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm meditating. Then can I get a general lay of the land and sense running water and rivers, so we can avoid those?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You watch them vanish ahead of you. A few moments pass, and you guys end up making your way back to the group, and you see the (squish) footfalls of both of your tiny gnome friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How far away is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It comes to a stop and then drops out from under you both (squish) into the sludge.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I grab Pike, and we both go invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I pick up the broom before we go invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, and you're casting Invisibility?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Invisibility. I guess at one level higher, right? Is that what I do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe that's what you do to get more of that. Making sure real fast, so we don't mess this up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Level three Invisibility.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Her house is going to have chicken feet. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You both turn invisible, her clutching the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're both invisible now. You're clutching the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We're invisible and the broom is invisible?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go (surprised shriek).

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We start tip-toeing out, I suppose.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, that was fun. Thank you guys so much for joining us for this. We're going to go ahead and take a few minutes here and do a short Q and A with those of you guys we have here in the stage before we need to clean up here, and we'll do the meet and greet upstairs. That being the case, do we have a set-up over there with the microphone to ask questions?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: The chair was really big. I mean, anybody's tall to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That is true.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, she was very large.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Super important question Did they see you?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, the broom stopped flying.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Run.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you saying we should hide, Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We should go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Where?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Clutching the broom in your hands, as you emit the phrase that you've known to bring it to vibrant magical life... (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The broom jumps to life. (cheering and laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Matt, for saving a marriage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And there, backing up from this abode in the center of the Shademirk bog, your broom retrieved, your party members gathered, looking towards that glowing window, and now the ajar door inviting you in to some degree, we'll pick this up next session. (cheering and applause)
